LanguageData.WM_IdeoRole_Surveyor.label: surveyor
LanguageData.WM_IdeoRole_Surveyor.description: A specialist dedicated to infrastructure and logistics. Surveyors coordinate road-building efforts, manage resources, and ensure settlements remain connected. Their presence accelerates construction and mining, and they can inspire nearby workers with the Coordinate Works ability.
LanguageData.WM_Infrastructure_Required.label: required
LanguageData.WM_Infrastructure_Required.description: We must build roads and railways to connect our settlements. Successfully completing a road inspires our people with a variable mood boost depending on the road's quality and length (+2 to +30 mood). Failing to do so is a mark of shame.
LanguageData.WM_Ritual_GroundbreakingCeremony.label: groundbreaking ceremony
LanguageData.WM_Ritual_GroundbreakingCeremony.descrip: A ceremony led by the Surveyor to mark the beginning of a major project. Participants receive a mood boost based on the quality of the ceremony, and on good outcomes a timed construction speed buff.
LanguageData.WM_Ritual_OpeningOfTheLine.label: opening of the line
LanguageData.WM_Ritual_OpeningOfTheLine.description: A ceremony led by the Surveyor to celebrate the completion of a road or railway. Best performed after successfully connecting two points on the world map. On positive outcomes friendly caravans will arrive, drawn by word of the new route.
